response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: 00:00-02:10 is an introductory talk about birthday merchandise. 2. 02:10-04:59 features a vocal performance of a song. 3. Identified on-screen text: 'Draw.' as the song title, and 'Orcaにゃん' as the lyricist/composer. 4. Used search tool with query 'Raora Panthera Draw lyrics' to confirm details and get full lyrics. 5. Lyrics retrieved and formatted for JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a segment where Raora Panthera discusses birthday merchandise, followed by a vocal performance of her original song "Draw.".

scenes.description: Raora Panthera talks with other VTubers about birthday merchandise. No vocal music is playing.
Raora Panthera performs her original song 'Draw.', with on-screen lyrics and credits to 'Orcaにゃん' for lyrics and music arrangement.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
夢のぬくもりと
指先に絵の具の匂い
湿ったキャンバスの上には
まだ知らない色が息をする

All the pieces I picked up
Unravel in my own chest
“It's okay,” I whisper softly
Saying it back to myself

迷いも震えも
隠さなくていいから
この線の全部が
私へ続く

I'm drawing out my true colors
滲んだ輪郭も
淡く、脆く、煌めいて
形になってゆくの
夜明けの面影に
集めた色を重ね
Draw it slow, draw it true

夜明けの夢現
微睡に余白の答え
白いページに色が咲いていく
息づいた景色を描き出す

All the colors I held back
Start to gather in the hush
“It's all right,” the first light tells me
Sending warmth into my heart

願いも希望も
隠さなくていいんだよ
ほら、ありのままの
私を描く

At last, hold my true colors
ほどけた輪郭も
そっと、ずっと、重なって
私の形になる
静かな始まりに
目覚めた色を抱いて

I'm drawing out my true colors
滲んだ輪郭も
淡く、脆く、煌めいて
形になってゆくの
夜明けの面影を
集めた色で描く
Draw it slow, draw it true

Ah - ah - ah - ah - ah
(La, la, la,
La, la, la
La, la, la, la, la, la, la)
Ah - ah - ah - ah - ah
Draw it slow, draw it true

夢のぬくもりと
指先に絵の具の匂い
ありふれた朝の先には
まだ知らない色が溢れてる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Warmth of a dream
And the scent of paint on my fingertips
On the damp canvas
Colors I don't know yet are breathing

All the pieces I picked up
Unravel in my own chest
"It's okay," I whisper softly
Saying it back to myself

I don't need to hide
My hesitation or my trembling
All of these lines
Lead to me

I'm drawing out my true colors
The blurred outlines too
Faintly, fragilely, sparkling
They become a form

In the shadow of the dawn
I layer the colors I gathered
Draw it slow, draw it true

Dawn's dream-reality
An answer in the margins of a doze
Colors bloom on the white page
Drawing out the scenery that has come to life

All the colors I held back
Start to gather in the hush
"It's all right," the first light tells me
Sending warmth into my heart

I don't need to hide
My wishes or my hopes
Look, I am drawing
Myself as I am

At last, hold my true colors
The unraveled outlines too
Softly, always, layering
They become my form

In the quiet beginning
Embracing the awakened colors

I'm drawing out my true colors
The blurred outlines too
Faintly, fragilely, sparkling
They become a form

In the shadow of the dawn
I draw with the colors I gathered
Draw it slow, draw it true

Ah - ah - ah - ah - ah
(La, la, la,
La, la, la
La, la, la, la, la, la, la)
Ah - ah - ah - ah - ah
Draw it slow, draw it true

Warmth of a dream
And the scent of paint on my fingertips
Beyond the ordinary morning
Colors I don't know yet are overflowing
